notes: The asset and debt cards on the Net Worth screen now carry a soft top-lit wash of their own colour \u2014 green for assets, shares, mortgages and loans, red for debts \u2014 instead of sitting flat white in the light theme. The tint comes from each theme's own palette, so every theme (including both mono modes) keeps its character.

The Add New menu has proper depth: each option is now a layered gradient card in its type colour with a matching icon chip, a short line explaining what it does, and a chevron \u2014 replacing the flat single-tint rows.
